summary: Complete frontend testing of /blog/dryer-taking-too-long article page redesign with Precision Craft design system. All 24 features verified and passing. Page implements the 8-section spec with Hero, 2-Column Layout (68/32), Article Content (TOC, Fire Warning, 7 Sections with DIY boxes, Mid-CTA, Checklist, When to Call, FAQ Accordion, Bottom CTA, Author Box), Sticky Sidebar (3 widgets), Related Services, Minimal Footer, Floating + Mobile CTAs, and SEO with Article+FAQPage+BreadcrumbList schemas.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Article page /blog/dryer-taking-too-long fully tested with Precision Craft design system. All features verified: (1) Hero with breadcrumb Home → Blog → Dryer, category pill 'Dryer' with orange background, date January 12 2025, 6 min read. (2) H1: Why Is My Dryer Taking So Long to Dry? 7 Causes + DIY Fixes — Bay Area Guide. (3) 2-column layout 65.6%/30.9% (748px/352px). (4) TOC with 9 anchor links (clogged-vent, lint-trap, heating-element, gas-valve, moisture-sensor, overloading, drum-seals, checklist, when-to-call). (5) Fire Hazard Warning box with 🔥 icon and orange border-left (#FF5722). (6) 7 numbered H2 article sections. (7) DIY FIX box in Section 1 with navy #0D1B2A background and 4 numbered steps. (8) Signs of clogged vent: 4 items with orange dot bullets. (9) Mid-article CTA after Section 4 (Gas Valve) with orange #FF5722 background, Call and Book buttons. (10) Checklist: 5 items with circle checkmarks. (11) When to Call section: 5 items with orange dash bullets. (12) FAQ: 5 questions accordion style, click expand/collapse works, chevron rotates 180deg. (13) Bottom CTA: SAME-DAY SERVICE eyebrow, navy #0D1B2A background. (14) Author box: avatar A, Andrei, License #51001. (15) Sidebar Widget 1: SAME-DAY DRYER REPAIR with Call/Book buttons. (16) Sidebar Widget 2: Dryer Fire Safety with 3 warning items and urgency line 'If you smell burning — stop the dryer now'. (17) Sidebar Widget 3: Related Articles with 4 links. (18) Related Services: 3 cards. (19) Minimal footer: logo, phone (760) 543-5733, copyright 2026 FixitBay LLC. (20) Floating BOOK REPAIR button on desktop after 300px scroll. (21) Mobile sticky bar with CALL, BOOK ONLINE, TEXT US buttons. (22) SEO: title, meta description, canonical https://fixitbay.net/blog/dryer-taking-too-long. (23) Article/FAQPage/BreadcrumbList JSON-LD schemas. (24) No console errors. Uses custom SEOMetaTags + useSchemas hook (NOT react-helmet-async).
